title: Oracle SCM Techno-Functional Consultant
description:
Oracle SCM Techno Functionals Consultant -Singapore (50% Technical+50% Functional)

Reporting to the Manager, SCM Enterprise Application, this role will be a member of the Oracle ERP implementation & Support project team to work with the implementation partner, business users and IT to gather requirements, analyze, design and implement technology best practice. This role will also ensure the smooth running of critical business processes after project implementation. Should have hands on experience with Development of Integrations, Data Migrations, Customizations.

Responsibilities:

·       Manage full life cycle of Requirement, Design, Build, Testing, Deployment and Support

·       Develop and document AS-IS / TO-BE business processes, configuration scripts, and other associated functional specifications from end user requirements, as well as system documentation for new implementations

·       Assist with the configuration and development of application objects, workflow, reporting, integration, and conversion programs, etc

·       Outline functional testing scenarios, prepare test scripts and conduct unit and system integration tests

·       Conduct user training and manage user testing

·       Analyze and solve complex customer issues related to data and processes

·       Track and follow up on operational issues, and perform change impact analysis for quarterly changes on BAU landscape with reference to the project landscape

·       Liaise with Biz users and vendor and ensure the deliverables with quality.

·       Manage Oracle ERP R12 related support activities & Help with Oracle Fusion implementation.

Minimum Qualifications:

·       Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science or equivalent

·       At least 5-7 years of experience, with at least 3 end to end Oracle EBS & Oracle Fusion cloud project implementation in Supply Chain & Distribution, with sound business process knowledge (e.g. Order-To-Cash, Procure-to-Pay) in a global environment. Order-To-Cash implementation must have.

·       Hands on experience with Oracle Fusion Supply Chain & Distribution modules like Oracle Purchasing, Sourcing, Supplier portal, Purchase Contracts, Inventory, Warehouse Management, Pricing, Order Management. Preference given to those with experience in  Global Trade management, RFsmart(Android experience preferable)

·       Hands on experience with Oracle Fusion Cloud Data Structure and Data Flow. Design, Development, Integration, BI Publisher, EDI, OTBI reports & Dashboards, PL/SQL, OAF ADF,Personalization, Oracle Application frameworks, XML publisher reports and interfaces using PLSQL Stored Procedures.

·       Experience Data conversion patterns into Oracle Cloud ERP (FBDI/FBDL, ADFDi)

·       Good understanding of Oracle PaaS & SaaS architecture

·       Prior experience in Oracle EBS to Fusion Cloud migration will be a definite plus

·       Experienced in an end-user environment is a requirement and those with experience in high-tech manufacturing will be a plus

·       Positive attitude, enthusiastic, self-motivated, sensitive to team dynamics & cultures

·       Strong written and oral communication skills

·       Keen attention to detail

·       Well versed in SCRUM project methodology

·       Able to interact with Mandarin-speaking users to understand the business requirements
